title: OUTPATIENT SERVICES - 211info
text: DOWNTOWN CLINIC OUTPATIENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health counseling and peer support services. Clients will have access to case management services. 201 W 6th Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Walk-ins: Monday-Friday 8:30am-2pm Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 200-2900 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 200-2900 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP, JCC, AllCare, and most Medicare plans. Sliding scale fees may be available. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of address, insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Community Mental Health Agencies If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DOWNTOWN CLINIC
